# Hey extraction ledger

- Keep target triples, ABI MIR, direct LLVM/ELF, callback registration, and generic receipts in Hey.
- Keep cross-platform lifecycle/view/action vocabulary in `hey_mobile`.
- Keep Android SDK/NDK/Gradle/emulator/device orchestration and Android host mappings here.
- Keep application screens, schemas, auth, storage formats, and Play metadata in applications.
- Add no Android syntax to the language core.
- Consider stdlib promotion only after two unrelated applications use a stable, portable abstraction.
- Platform security capabilities remain opaque and package-owned until iOS/Android parity is proven.
